claim_boundary: Adjudication from existing snapshot fields only. No ground-truth labels or human committee labels are invented.
main_result: The prior benchmark exposed repeatable boundary disagreement, but the existing snapshot does not prove model superiority. The disagreements reduce to a policy tradeoff: the model gives more weight to stronger 30-day consensus among no-domain validators, while the deterministic baseline gives more weight to public domain accountability. Operator independence, entity continuity, and concentration lift are undecidable from these rows because country/asn/operator fields are absent for all 10 disagreements.
